transcript.content: Hi Amit, welcome to Health India! We need to get your mandatory medical check­up scheduled. Would you prefer having a doctor visit you at home, or would you rather go to a diagnostic center?
I can help you schedule your mandatory medical check­up. Would you like a doctor to visit your home, or would you prefer to go to a diagnostic center?
You chose home visit. Do you wish to confirm?
Great - a home visit it is! What time in the morning works best for you? Seven am, eight am, or nine am are available.
